children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There is established a fund to be known as the World Trade Center Health Program Fund (referred to in this section as the “Fund”).

children.label: i
children.text: for fiscal year 2016, $330,000,000;

children.label: ii
children.text: for fiscal year 2017, $345,610,000;

children.label: iii
children.text: for fiscal year 2018, $380,000,000;

children.label: iv
children.text: for fiscal year 2019, $440,000,000;

children.label: v
children.text: for fiscal year 2020, $485,000,000;

children.label: vi
children.text: for fiscal year 2021, $501,000,000;

children.label: vii
children.text: for fiscal year 2022, $518,000,000;

children.label: viii
children.text: for fiscal year 2023, $535,000,000;

children.label: ix
children.text: for fiscal year 2024, $552,000,000;

children.label: x
children.text: for fiscal year 2025, $570,000,000;

children.label: I
children.text: the amount determined under this subparagraph for the previous fiscal year multiplied by 1.07; multiplied by

children.label: aa
children.text: the total number of individuals enrolled in the WTC Program on July 1 of such previous fiscal year; to

children.label: bb
children.text: the total number of individuals so enrolled on July 1 of the fiscal year prior to such previous fiscal year; and

children.label: xii
children.text: for each subsequent fiscal year through fiscal year 2090, the amount specified under this subparagraph for the previous fiscal year increased by the percentage increase in the consumer price index for all urban consumers (all items; United States city average) as estimated by the Secretary for the 12-month period ending with March of the previous year; plus

children.label: B
children.text: the New York City share, consisting of the amount contributed under the contract under .section 300mm–41(d) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: No funds may be disbursed from the Fund unless New York City has entered into a contract with the WTC Program Administrator under .section 300mm–41(d)(1) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: the amount is recoverable under subparagraph (E)(ii) of such section;

children.label: ii
children.text: such failure shall not affect the disbursement of amounts from the Fund; and

children.label: iii
children.text: the Federal share described in paragraph (2)(A) shall not be increased by the amount so unpaid.

children.heading: Amounts from prior fiscal years
children.label: 4 Amounts from prior fiscal years
children.text: Amounts that were deposited, or identified for deposit, into the Fund for any fiscal year under paragraph (2), as such paragraph was in effect on the day before , that were not expended in carrying out this subchapter for any such fiscal year, shall remain deposited, or be deposited, as the case may be, into the Fund.December 18, 2015

children.heading: Amounts to remain available until expended
children.label: 5 Amounts to remain available until expended
children.text: Amounts deposited into the Fund under this subsection, including amounts deposited under paragraph (2) as in effect on the day before , for a fiscal year shall remain available, for the purposes described in this subchapter, until expended for such fiscal year and any subsequent fiscal year through fiscal year 2090.December 18, 2015

children.heading: Mandatory funds for monitoring, initial health evaluations, treatment, and claims processing
children.label: b Mandatory funds for monitoring, initial health evaluations, treatment, and claims processing

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The amounts deposited into the Fund under subsection (a)(2) shall be available, without further appropriation, consistent with paragraph (2) and subsection (c), to carry out part B and sections 300mm(e), 300mm(f), 300mm–1(a), 300mm–1(b), 300mm–2, 300mm–3, 300mm–4(a)(1), 300mm–4(a)(2), 300mm–4(c), 300mm–51, and 300mm–52 of this title.

children.heading: Limitation on mandatory funding
children.label: 2 Limitation on mandatory funding
children.text: This subchapter does not establish any Federal obligation for payment of amounts in excess of the amounts available from the Fund for such purpose or as available from the World Trade Center Health Program Supplemental Fund under , the World Trade Center Health Program Special Fund under , or the World Trade Center Health Program Fund for Certain WTC Responders at the Pentagon and Shanksville, Pennsylvania under .section 300mm–62 of this titlesection 300mm–63 of this titlesection 300mm–64 of this title

children.heading: Limitation on authorization for further appropriations
children.label: 3 Limitation on authorization for further appropriations
children.text: This subchapter does not establish any authorization for appropriation of amounts in excess of the amounts available from the Fund under paragraph (1) or as available from the World Trade Center Health Program Supplemental Fund under , the World Trade Center Health Program Special Fund under , or the World Trade Center Health Program Fund for Certain WTC Responders at the Pentagon and Shanksville, Pennsylvania under .section 300mm–62 of this titlesection 300mm–63 of this titlesection 300mm–64 of this title

children.heading: Limitation for research cohort for emerging health impacts on youth
children.label: 4 Limitation for research cohort for emerging health impacts on youth
children.text: Notwithstanding paragraph (1), the amounts made available under such paragraph may not be used for fiscal years 2023 through 2032 to carry out subsection (c) of .section 300mm–51 of this title

children.heading: Limits on spending for certain purposes
children.label: c Limits on spending for certain purposes
